description: New feature touching multiple layers → FULL
query: add email notification functionality to the user service: send confirmation emails on register, and password-reset emails on request

assertions.check: output contains 'full' or 'FULL' as mode classification
branch setup targets develop as base, not main

assertions.text: Branch uses feature/ prefix or asks user for a feature/ branch name
assertions.check: output proposes a branch starting with 'feature/' OR asks user to provide a branch name with 'feature/' as suggested prefix
dev-loop-context.md YAML frontmatter has 'mode: full'
output mentions new feature, new domain, or multiple architectural layers as classification reason

query: add a soft-delete mechanism: deleted_at column to the articles table and update all queries to filter it out

assertions.check: output contains 'full' or 'FULL' as mode classification
output mentions schema change, migration, or API contract change as classification reason
dev-loop-context.md YAML frontmatter has 'mode: full'

description: Small isolated bug in one file → QUICK
query: there's a small bug where the user profile endpoint returns a 500 when the avatar_url is null. it's a quick fix in UserController.ts

assertions.check: output contains 'quick' or 'QUICK' as mode classification

assertions.text: Branch from develop using fix/ prefix
assertions.check: output states that the branch will use 'fix/' prefix AND targets develop as base branch — both conditions must be present
dev-loop-context.md YAML frontmatter has 'mode: quick'
output mentions bug fix, isolated, single file, or same layer as classification reason

description: Small refactor within same layer → QUICK
query: refactor the validateEmail function in AuthService.ts to use a regex constant instead of inline regex — it's called from 2 places in the same file

assertions.check: output contains 'quick' or 'QUICK' as mode classification
dev-loop-context.md YAML frontmatter has 'mode: quick'

query: fix the typo in the error message in AuthMiddleware.ts --full

assertions.text: Classifies as FULL mode due to --full flag
assertions.check: output contains 'full' or 'FULL' as mode classification, not Quick
output mentions --full flag or user override as reason for Full mode

description: Jira ticket for multi-layer feature → FULL
query: implement BEP-2210 — it's the full notification system: push notifications, in-app alerts, email digest

assertions.check: output contains 'full' or 'FULL' as mode classification

assertions.text: Attempts to fetch Jira ticket BEP-2210
assertions.check: output mentions fetching BEP-2210 or references Jira context
proposed branch name starts with 'feature/BEP-2210'
dev-loop-context.md YAML has 'jira: BEP-2210'
